name: coins-hold-and-win-math
description: Static A2A discovery card for the deterministic slot-math capabilities of the Coins: Hold & Win play-money demo (no real money, no accounts, no AI/LLM runtime). NO LIVE A2A ENDPOINT YET: this is a phase-A discovery card; the `url` points to the project repository, not a live JSON-RPC A2A endpoint (none exists in phase A). The skills below describe deterministic functions runnable from this repo's source (src/slotmath.js). See STATUS.md and docs/adr/0019-agent-interop-static-surface.md.

skills.name: Verify RTP (exact)
skills.description: Compute the exact theoretical return-to-player, house edge, per-line hit frequency, standard deviation, and jackpot odds for the play-money model by full payline enumeration. Deterministic: no RNG, no network. Implemented by theoreticalRtp() / parSheet() in src/slotmath.js.

skills.name: Simulate RTP (seeded Monte-Carlo)
skills.description: Run a seeded Monte-Carlo simulation of the full game (base lines plus the Hold & Win feature) and return total RTP with a 95% confidence interval, the line/bonus RTP split, hit frequency, and bonus-trigger and grand-jackpot rates. Deterministic for a given seed. Implemented by monteCarloFullGame() in src/slotmath.js.

x-lifecycle.note: Growing until explicitly frozen (see STATUS.md). Phase A is a static discovery card only: no live A2A/MCP endpoint and no authentication. A live endpoint plus machine-to-machine auth is deferred (phase B).
